name: eidos-marketplace
description: The plugin marketplace for Claude Code, by Eidos AGI. Curated agent-first plugins, audited to a public standard.

plugins.name: cept
plugins.description: Proprioception for coding agents — slice recent Claude Code transcript, redact, send to a model gateway, return structured steering guidance.

plugins.name: resume-resume
plugins.description: Post-crash session recovery, dirty repos inventory, and session search across your full Claude Code history

plugins.name: ike
plugins.description: Task and project management — create tasks, track milestones, manage documents, and execute within visionlog contracts

plugins.name: visionlog
plugins.description: Vision, goals, guardrails, SOPs, and ADRs — the contracts all execution must honor

plugins.name: railguey
plugins.description: Railway deployment management — deploy, rollback, logs, health checks, and service configuration

plugins.name: clawdflare
plugins.description: Cloudflare management — DNS records, Workers, Pages, KV, R2, and analytics

plugins.name: research-md
plugins.description: Evidence-graded, phase-gated research decisions — candidates, findings, scoring matrices, and peer review

plugins.name: probe-forge
plugins.description: Agentic testing forge — point at anything, say test this. Runs THE-LOOP to investigate targets intelligently

plugins.name: forge-forge
plugins.description: Meta-forge for creating and managing forges — manifest validation, drift detection, and forge scaffolding
